headline: Expanding Big Data & Analytics Market Aids TRU Amid High Rivalry
summary: TransUnion gains from growing demand for data analytics, acquisitions and innovation, though debt and seasonality remain key risks.

headline: Heatwave Strengthens Bullish Case For Utility ETFs, HVAC Stocks Amid Surging Power Demand
summary: A record heatwave is boosting interest in utility ETFs as rising power demand, grid modernization, climate adaptation drive long-term opportunities.

raw.headline: Heatwave Strengthens Bullish Case For Utility ETFs, HVAC Stocks Amid Surging Power Demand
